subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Upon thee rest the peace of God and His loving-kindness. Thou hast ever been and art remembered, and the glance of His tender mercy is upon thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علیک سلام الله و عنایته لازال مذکور بوده و هستی و لحاظ عنایت بشما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity; oneness of humanity
